data: Creamy Tuscan Chicken: Season 4 chicken breasts with salt, pepper, and Italian seasoning. Sear in olive oil until golden and cooked through, then remove. In the same pan, saute 3 minced garlic cloves, 1 cup sun-dried tomatoes, and 3 cups fresh spinach. Stir in 1 cup heavy cream and 1/2 cup parmesan. Bring to a simmer, return chicken to pan, and coat in sauce.
